title: Marathon Players are Already Giving Up Hope
description:
Now 24 hours post launch, we have updated on how Marathon is doing and players are already very concerned for the game, and even predicting incoming layoffs at Bungie. Then some other amusing things to take a look at.

04:56 Highguard, Geoff Keighley, Game Awards update lol
06:02 Bungie wants Marathon reviews delayed
07:58 Gaming Journalism is a joke
09:25 End
